mission.title: thanos: Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding overlapping block make frontend crash
mission.description: Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding overlapping block make frontend crash. This issue affects 27+ users.

steps.title: Identify thanos troubleshoot symptoms
steps.description:
Check for the issue in your thanos deployment:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n cert-manager -l app=thanos
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n cert-manager --tail=100 | grep -i error
```
Look for error: `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'thanos')`

steps.title: Check current resource configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant thanos resources:
```bash
kubectl get resource -A
kubectl describe resource <name> -n <namespace>
```
**Thanos, Prometheus and Golang version used**:

* Thanos `quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.25.2`
* Thanos `quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.26.0`
* Thanos `quay.io/thanos/thanos:v0.27.0`
* ...
* Thanos `quay.io/than

steps.title: Apply the fix for Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding overlappin
steps.description:
Add null check to find overlapping blocks logic to solve #5359.
```yaml
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'thanos')
    in t
    in L
    in j
    in x
    in j
    in div
    in h
    in n
    in Da
```

steps.title: Confirm Compactor/Store Gateway/Bucket UI: Enable finding  is resolved
steps.description:
Verify the fix by checking that the original error no longer occurs:
```bash
kubectl logs -l app.kubernetes.io/name=thanos -n cert-manager --tail=50 --since=5m
kubectl get events -n cert-manager --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm that `Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'thanos')` no longer appears in logs.

resolution.summary: The root cause is: Add null check to find overlapping blocks logic to solve #5359.. This fixes the issue because it addresses the underlying problem that was causing the failure.

prerequisites.description: A running Kubernetes cluster with thanos installed or the issue environment reproducible.
